steps.title: Read the cleft sentence
steps.content: The sentence uses the structure "is what has ___." After "has," the blank needs a past participle and standard object order. Because the sentence is a statement, it also needs a period, not a question mark.

steps.title: Eliminate form errors
steps.content: A ends the statement with a question mark. B also uses a question mark and places the object before the verb, while C keeps that incorrect word order. The grammatically complete wording is "earned him his enduring fame." The answer is D.
